title: Successfully Generate Test Cases With Valid Requirement and Default Template
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can select a requirement, choose the default template, and successfully generate structured test cases that are displayed on screen.
expected_result: The system generates and displays one or more structured test cases based on the selected requirement and default template. Each test case contains a title, description, and steps. No error messages appear.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generator page
test_steps.expected: Test case generator page loads successfully

test_steps.action: Select a requirement from the requirements dropdown
test_steps.expected: Requirement 'User Authentication Flow' is selected in the dropdown

test_steps.action: Select the default template from the template dropdown
Click the Generate Test Cases button
test_steps.expected: A loading indicator appears while test cases are being generated

test_steps.action: Wait for the test case results to appear
test_steps.expected: Test cases results panel becomes visible

test_steps.action: Verify the generated test cases list is populated
test_steps.expected: At least one structured test case is displayed in the results panel
